inputs.titre: Invention du haut fourneau en Chine

reason: The image depicts a group of people standing near a large building with a glowing opening that suggest a blast furnace. The clothing appears generally appropriate for a historical setting, but the architectural style of the building in the center has a more European and modern flair which is suspect. It is also lacking the characteristics of ancient Chinese architecture, there are also some hats that are modern in design. The mountains in the background seem to be in Asia, though. The general atmosphere is plausible but the architecture is too different.
